title: Aureline device-registry and settings-sync seed envelope
description: Boundary schema for artifacts/settings/m1_device_registry_and_sync_seed.yaml. The envelope pins the canonical row vocabulary at settings_sync_state.schema.json, the reviewer-facing landing page at docs/settings/m1_sync_and_device_seed.md, the existing optional-sync seed documentation as an upstream source, the build-identity record the validation lane embeds, the validation-lane registry ref, the closed device-participation / sync-session / conflict-review / resolution-state / resolution-path / scope-broadening-verdict / non-widening-posture / local-ownership / data-portability vocabularies, the required coverage lists, the named-runtime-consumer set the seed asserts is live, and the named failure-drill ids the per-row drills must draw from. Rows conform to the row schema; the envelope cannot relax that contract.

upstream_sync_contract_ref.description: Upstream optional-sync seed documentation the M1 seed projects against. Must resolve on disk.

upstream_settings_registry_ref.description: Optional reference to the upstream settings schema-registry seed.

device_participation_state_class_vocabul.description: Closed device-participation vocabulary. MUST agree with the row schema's device_participation_state_class $defs enum.

conflict_review_class_vocabulary.description: Closed conflict-review vocabulary later UI surfaces consume verbatim. Surfaces MUST NOT invent their own conflict status names; widening requires a new decision row.

data_portability_class_vocabulary.description: Closed data-portability vocabulary. Names which data classes are portable, machine-local, excluded, or policy-owned in the M1 seed model.

failure_drill_id_vocabulary.description: Closed vocabulary of named failure drills the per-row failure_drill blocks must draw from.

named_runtime_consumers.description: Named live consumers that read the device-registry / settings-sync seed. The lane resolves consumer_ref on disk and asserts consumed_fields is non-empty so a consumer cannot regress to mentioned-but-unread.

required_device_participation_state_cove.description: Device participation states that MUST appear at least once across the entries (the seed's device-registry lifecycle coverage).

required_sync_session_state_coverage.description: Sync session states that MUST appear at least once across the entries (the seed's session-state coverage).

required_conflict_review_class_coverage.description: Conflict-review classes that MUST appear at least once across the entries so the seed can show every surface how to render each protected status.

required_data_portability_class_coverage.description: Data-portability classes that MUST appear at least once in the union of every row's data_class_portabilities. Forces the seed to document portable / machine_local / excluded / policy_owned data classes.
